user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Enter the host, update interval, and Modbus IP restriction. Minimum interval: 5 seconds. If no stored token exists for this host, the next step asks for the customer password.

user_password.title: Customer Password
user_password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token. The password is not stored in the config entry.

reconfigure.title: Review Fronius System
reconfigure.description: Review the host, update interval, and Modbus IP restriction. Minimum interval: 5 seconds. If the stored token is missing or invalid, the next step asks for the customer password.

reconfigure_password.title: Customer Password
reconfigure_password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token.

error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant IP.

init.title: Review Fronius System
init.description: The entry "{entry_title}" needs a valid customer token. Review the host, update interval, and Modbus IP restriction. The next step asks for the customer password only if needed.

password.title: Customer Password
password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token.

error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant IP.

abort.entry_not_found: The Fronius entry no longer exists.

json_api_low_firmware.title: Disable Fronius JSON API on older firmware

init.title: Disable JSON API
init.description: The inverter "{entry_title}" is running firmware {current_version}, which is below the safe minimum {minimum_version}. When JSON API stays enabled on older firmware it can cause a memory leak and inverter outages over time. Choose whether to disable JSON API now or ignore this warning.

menu_option_descriptions.ignore: Keep JSON API enabled and hide this warning for now.

confirm.title: Disable JSON API
confirm.description: Press Submit to disable JSON API on the inverter "{entry_title}".

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter.

abort.entry_not_found: The Fronius entry no longer exists.
abort.issue_ignored: The warning was ignored. You can unignore it later from Repairs.

init.title: Set up Fronius System
init.description: Set the host, update interval, and Modbus IP restriction. Minimum interval: 5 seconds. If the stored token is missing or invalid, the next step asks for the customer password.

password.title: Customer Password
password.description: Enter the customer password to create or refresh the stored token.

error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant IP.
